de: Wetterbilanz: Welche Folgen die Rekord-Trockenheit für Bayern hat. Seit 1881 war in Bayern kein Frühjahr so trocken wie das gerade zu Ende gegangene. Vielerorts konnten sich die Menschen über Badewetter freuen. Doch der Wassermangel führt jetzt schon zu Problemen.
en: Weather balance: What consequences the record drought is having for Bavaria. Since 1881, no spring in Bavaria has been as dry as the one that has just ended. In many places people were able to enjoy swimming weather. But the lack of water is already causing problems.
la: Tempestas statera: Quae consequentia recordum siccitatis in Bavariam habent. Ab anno 1881, nullus fons in Bavaria ita siccus est ut unum quod modo finivit. Multis locis homines natationibus frui poterant. Sed penuria aquarum iam est causa problems.
